title: Single-cell suspensions from primary human esophagus tissue
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"dopr6","text":"A protocol to dissociate fresh esophagus tissue specimens for single-cell transcriptomics.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"esbla","text":"Ensure all instruments needed are available and to hand before you start","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"cs1e1","text":"Work in a containment level 2 facility and safety cabinet","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ba222","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8qgle","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"4pnum","text":"Biological Hazard - ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1kap4","text":"All biological samples should be treated as a possible cause of infection. Your departmental guidelines must be adhered to when handling human material. Working with primary cells may put the user at risk of exposure to blood-borne pathogens.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"kdvo","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5p28r","text":"- Physical Hazard -","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5qe4n","text":"Scalpes are sharp. Care must be taken when using scalpels.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2g2h9","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"alj6n","text":"Always wear a lab coat and gloves","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

Sigma: 112138857001) working concentraion 3U/ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aepd9","text":"         1 aliquot of DNAse (100ul at 2000U/ml. Sigma: 11284932001) working concentration 40U/ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"664av","text":"         DMEM (Sigma: D5671-500ml)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2lrtj","text":"         10% FBS (Pan Biotech: F40-37500)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b1tkn","text":"         1% LGlut (ThermoFisher: 25030081)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"175de","text":"         1% Penstrep (Sigma: P4333-100ml)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5t7sl","text":"DMEM empty","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2r1o7","text":"RBC lysis solution:","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7n6c4","text":"        1ml RBC lysis reagent: ThermoFisher (00-4300-54)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"10v4n","text":"        9ml H2O","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":13,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"13vqd","text":"Trypsin-EDTA solution: Sigma (T3924-100ml)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9uph8","text":"Trypan blue: Sigma (T8154-20ml)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eciub","text":"CChip: Labtech (DHC-F01)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Transfer the minced tissue to the Collagenase/DNAse solution in a 50ml Falcon.
Shake the suspension at 110-150 rpm for 60 mins at 37°C (with the tube on its side to increase agitation of the tissue).
After 15, 30, and 60 mins – pipette up and down with descending sized pipettes (25, 10 and 5 ml).
Strain with a 70 um cell strainer.
Add 10 ml DMEM (empty) to sieve and push through with syringe plunger.
Keep on ice from this point.
Spin 1500 rpm for 5mins and remove media.
Resuspend pellet in RBC lysis buffer and incubate @ 4°C for 10mins.
Add 10 ml DMEM (empty) and pipette up and down thoroughly.
Pass through 40 um cell strainer – pushing through with plunger.
Spin at 1500 rpm for 5 mins and remove media.
Resuspend pellet in 1 ml of cell suspension buffer.
In a 0.5ml tube, add 10 ul cell solution with 10 ul trypan blue.
Add resultant 20 ul mix onto disposable haemocytometer (C-Chip, FR type).
Count the cells and record cell viability
creator: Matthew JJ Rose Zerilli
